creator: jasiu@tool.eu.org
text:
Created attachment 246054
log from poudriere

mysql57-server-5.7.42 fails to build with poudriere and with classic make from ports while using DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl in make.conf

$ pkg info | grep ^openssl
openssl-3.0.12,1               TLSv1.3 capable SSL and crypto library

see attached log for details
